name: iis
explanation: IIS is collected via Windows Performance Counters (PDH) on the local host where the Agent runs — there's no remote host/port in the default mode. Auto-config reduces to: detect whether IIS is installed (the W3SVC service) on this machine and enable the check with default sites/app_pools (all). The legacy `pdh_legacy` template can target a remote machine via username/password, but that's an opt-in mode.
notes: Auto-config trigger here is 'IIS service present', not a network probe. Several Windows-host integrations (active_directory, dns_check, exchange) likely follow the same pattern — flag for shared treatment.
